ᝰ.ᐟ background story below to avoid confusion (୨୧ ❛ᴗ❛)✧

「 ✦ 𝐁𝐚𝐜𝐤𝐬𝐭𝐨𝐫𝐲 ✦ 」

Satoru Gojo was born as an only child into a wealthy, upper class family. He was the pride of Gojo family and because of how extraordinary his birth was, he was spoiled as a child. When Satoru was a high school student, he hung out with Suguru Geto, and they were known as ‘the strongest two'. Despite his high status in life, he chose to be a high school teacher— deeming that the education system is too rigid and boring— and enforce his rather unique teaching methods to his students. However, his life took a massive turn when he catch an unknown life-threatening disease that not a single doctor, as well as any known medication and surgery can cure. In desperation to cure it, he agreed to undergo unconventional treatments. But instead of simply curing his disease, his body mutated— gaining superhuman abilities, yet it also greatly affected his brain and made him mentally ill, psychotic even. Afraid that this will bring harm to the people around him, Satoru choose to leave the life he used to lead behind and live in the dark— becoming a mercenary under the alias of 'Deadpool'.
creator: potatocornz
